name: Alliance
instructions: Gain a Province, a Duchy, an Estate, a Gold, a Silver, and a Copper.

name: Animal Fair
instructions:
+$4
+1 Buy per empty supply pile.
-----
Instead of paying this card's cost, you may trash an Action card from your hand.

name: Banish
instructions: Exile any number of cards with the same name from your hand.

name: Bargain
instructions: Gain a non-Victory card costing up to $5. Each other player gains a Horse.

name: Barge
instructions: Either now or at the start of your next turn, +3 Cards and +1 Buy.

name: Black Cat
instructions:
+2 Cards
If it isn't your turn, each other player gains a Curse.
-----
When another player gains a Victory card, you may play this from your hand.

name: Bounty Hunter
instructions:
+1 Action
Exile a card from your hand. If you didn't have a copy of it in Exile, +$3.

name: Camel Train
instructions:
Exile a non-Victory card from the Supply.
-----
When you gain this, Exile a Gold from the Supply.

name: Cardinal
instructions:
+$2
Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, Exiles one costing from $3 to $6, and discards the rest.

name: Cavalry
instructions:
Gain 2 Horses.
-----
When you gain this, +2 Cards, +1 Buy, and if it's your Buy phase return to your Action phase.

name: Commerce
instructions: Gain a Gold per differently named card you've gained this turn.

name: Coven
instructions:
+1 Action
+$2
Each other player Exiles a Curse from the Supply. If they can't, they discard their Exiled Curses.

name: Delay
instructions: You may set aside an Action card from your hand. At the start of your next turn, play it.

name: Demand
instructions: Gain a Horse and a card costing up to $4, both onto your deck.

name: Desperation
instructions: Once per turn: You may gain a Curse. If you do, +1 Buy and +$2.

name: Destrier
instructions:
+2 Cards
+1 Action
-----
During your turns, this costs $1 less per card you've gained this turn.

name: Displace
instructions: Exile a card from your hand. Gain a differently named card costing up to $2 more than it.

name: Enclave
instructions: Gain a Gold. Exile a Duchy from the Supply.

name: Enhance
instructions: You may trash a non-Victory card from your hand, to gain a card costing up to $2 more than it.

name: Falconer
instructions:
Gain a card to your hand costing less than this.
-----
When any player gains a card with 2 or more types (Action, Attack, etc.), you may play this from your hand.

name: Fisherman
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
+$1
-----
During your turns, if your discard pile is empty, this costs $3 less.

name: Gamble
instructions:
+1 Buy
Discard the top card of your deck. If it's an Action or Treasure, you may play it.

name: Gatekeeper
instructions: At the start of your next turn, +$3. Until then, when another player gains an Action or Treasure card they don't have an Exiled copy of, they Exile it.

name: Goatherd
instructions:
+1 Action
You may trash a card from your hand.
+1 Card per card the player to your right trashed on their last turn.

name: Groom
instructions:
Gain a card costing up to $4. If it's an...
Action card, gain a Horse; Treasure card, gain a Silver; Victory card, +1 Card and +1 Action.

name: Horse
instructions:
+2 Cards
+1 Action
Return this to its pile.
(This is not in the Supply.)

name: Hostelry
instructions:
+1 Card
+2 Actions
-----
When you gain this, you may discard any number of Treasures, revealed, to gain that many Horses.

name: Hunting Lodge
instructions:
+1 Card
+2 Actions
You may discard your hand for +5 Cards.

name: Invest
instructions: Exile an Action card from the Supply. While it's in Exile, when another player gains or Invests in a copy of it, +2 Cards.

name: Kiln
instructions:
+$2
The next time you play a card this turn, you may first gain a copy of it.

name: Livery
instructions:
+$3
This turn, when you gain a card costing $4 or more, gain a Horse.

name: March
instructions: Look through your discard pile. You may play an Action card from it.

name: Mastermind
instructions: At the start of your next turn, you may play an Action card from your hand three times.

name: Paddock
instructions:
+$2
Gain 2 Horses.
+1 Action per empty Supply pile.

name: Populate
instructions: Gain one card from each Action Supply pile.

name: Pursue
instructions:
+1 Buy
Name a card. Reveal the top 4 cards from your deck. Put the matches back and discard the rest.

name: Reap
instructions: Gain a Gold, setting it aside. At the start of your next turn, play it.

name: Ride
instructions: Gain a Horse.

name: Sanctuary
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
+1 Buy
You may Exile a card from your hand.

name: Scrap
instructions: Trash a card from your hand. Choose a different thing per $1 it costs: +1 Card; +1 Action; +1 Buy; +$1; gain a Silver; gain a Horse.

name: Seize the Day
instructions: Once per game: Take an extra turn after this one.

name: Sheepdog
instructions:
+2 Cards
-----
When you gain a card, you may play this from your hand.

name: Sleigh
instructions:
Gain 2 Horses.
-----
When you gain a card, you may discard this, to put that card into your hand or onto your deck.

name: Snowy Village
instructions:
+1 Card
+4 Actions
+1 Buy
Ignore any further +Actions you get this turn.

name: Stampede
instructions: If you have 5 or fewer cards in play, gain 5 Horses onto your deck.

name: Stockpile
instructions:
$3
+1 Buy
Exile this.

name: Supplies
instructions:
$1
Gain a Horse onto your deck.

name: Toil
instructions:
+1 Buy
You may play an Action card from your hand.

name: Transport
instructions: Choose one: Exile an Action card from the Supply; or put an Action card you have in Exile onto your deck.

name: Village Green
instructions:
Either now or at the start of your next turn, +1 Card and +2 Actions.
-----
When you discard this other than during Clean-up, you may play it.

name: Way of the Butterfly
instructions: You may return this to its pile to gain a card costing exactly $1 more than it.

name: Way of the Camel
instructions: Exile a Gold from the Supply.

name: Way of the Chameleon
instructions: Follow this card's instructions; each time that would give you +Cards this turn, you get +$ instead, and vice-versa.

name: Way of the Frog
instructions:
+1 Action
When you discard this from play this turn, put it onto your deck.

name: Way of the Goat
instructions: Trash a card from your hand.

name: Way of the Horse
instructions:
+2 Cards
+1 Action
Return this to its pile.

name: Way of the Mole
instructions:
+1 Action
Discard your hand. +3 Cards.

name: Way of the Mouse
instructions:
Play the set-aside card, leaving it there.
-----
Setup: Set aside an unused non-Duration Action costing $2 or $3.

name: Way of the Mule
instructions:
+1 Action
+$1

name: Way of the Otter
instructions: +2 Cards

name: Way of the Owl
instructions: Draw until you have 6 cards in hand.

name: Way of the Ox
instructions: +2 Actions

name: Way of the Pig
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action

name: Way of the Rat
instructions: You may discard a Treasure to gain a copy of this.

name: Way of the Seal
instructions:
+$1
This turn, when you gain a card, you may put it onto your deck.

name: Way of the Squirrel
instructions: +2 Cards at the end of this turn.

name: Way of the Turtle
instructions: Set this aside. If you did, play it at the start of your next turn.

name: Way of the Worm
instructions: Exile an Estate from the Supply.

name: Wayfarer
instructions:
+3 Cards
You may gain a Silver.
-----
This has the same cost as the last other card gained this turn, if any.
